title: bridge-jmap: email_get fetches up to 50 emails in one JMAP request without batching
description: bridge-jmap/src/jmap.rs email_get: sends all new IDs (up to 50) in a single Email/get request. JMAP servers enforce maxObjectsInGet (commonly 10-50). If the server applies this cap, it returns a subset and the rest are never seen in this poll cycle (also affects nie-y9mn.1). Should paginate or batch in chunks of min(ids.len(), server-reported maxObjectsInGet).
